description: Implement a custom Wazuh Active Response to forward high-severity alerts (Level 10 or higher) to a JSON file. Create a Python script at /var/ossec/active-response/bin/ticket_forwarder.py that reads the Active Response JSON payload from stdin, extracts the 'rule_id', 'level', 'description', and 'timestamp' fields, and appends them as a JSON object to /var/ossec/logs/ticketing_queue.json. The script must be owned by root:ossec with 750 permissions. Configure the Wazuh manager's ossec.conf to include a command named 'ticket-forward' and an active-response block that executes this command on the manager for alerts with level >= 10. Verify the integration by triggering a qualifying alert and confirming the output in the JSON log.
